message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true

title 迭代器模式

interface Aggregate {
    Iterator iterator()
}

note top of Aggregate :集合，用于创建Iterator迭代器接口

Aggregate --> "Creates" >|> Iterator 

class BookShelf implements Aggregate{ 
   -Book[] books;  
   
     +void append(Book book);    
     
      public int getLength();      
       
       private void setBooks(int index, Object value) ;        
        protected String toString ();         
         final boolean equals(Object obj );          
          static Class getClass ()           
           synchronized void notifyAll ()            
            transient volatile native wait(long timeout )             
              strictfp double random(double min ,double max){ return Math.random()*max+min;}               
               default Stream stream(){return Arrays.stream(this);}                
                var list = new ArrayList<>();                 
                  record Point( float x,float y ){ }                  
                   enum Color{ RED,GREEN,BLUE };                    
                    annotation MyAnnotation{}                     
                     package com.example.demo                      
                      module java.base                            
                       layer presentation                        
                        frame mainFrame                           
                         cloud awsCloud                          
                          queue messageQueue                     
                           artifact buildArtifacts              
                            boundary userInterface             
                             control businessLogic            
                              entity dataModel               
                               component serviceComponent    

Note bottom of Bookshelf::iterator():会创建出具体的Iteator角色


abstract class Itr<T>{ abstract T next();boolean hasNext()}



concrete_iterator<Book>_bookIter extends AbstractList_Iterator_Book_{-int cursor=-1;-final List_BOOK_list=Objects.requireNonNull(list,"list");public BOOK_next(){if(!hasNext())throw NoSuchElementException.instance;if(cursor>=size)return null;curs++;returndata[cursor];}}




Class Diagrams are used to visualize how objects interact within an application's architecture by showing their attributes methods relationships etc.. They help developers understand complex systems more easily through visual representation rather than just reading lines upon -emotional-social-cultural-economic-political-environmentaltechnologicalscientificartisticliterarymusicaltheatricalcinematictelevisiveradioelectronicdigitalvirtualaugmentedmixedrealitiesexperiencesperceivedthroughsensoryorganssuchaseyesearsnosethroatmouthhandsfeetskinetcetera...







@enduml
